Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC6 is missing an executor acknowledgment.

task_updates.executor_notes: Threaded `onContextMenu` through the gallery item prop chain into `GenerationsPaneGallery`, then added a selection-driven context menu flow there. Right-click now single-selects an unselected gallery item first, uses `Array.from(gallerySelectionMap.values()).map(entry => entry.generationId)` to preserve selection order, calls `createShot({ generationIds })`, clears gallery selection only after a successful shot creation, and opens `VideoGenerationModal` with the newly created `Shot` for Generate Video. Verified with `npx vitest run src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.test.tsx src/shared/components/MediaGalleryItem.behavior.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts`.

Extended the existing `ClipAction` portal menu with Create Shot / Generate Video entries while leaving the delete, split, mute, stale-variant, and dismiss actions intact. Timeline shot creation now resolves selected clips against `data.registry.assets`, hides the new actions whenever any selected clip lacks a `generationId`, sorts selected clips by `(trackIndex, action.start)` before extracting generation IDs, and opens the shared `VideoGenerationModal` from `TimelineEditor` with the created `Shot`. Verified with `npx vitest run src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.test.tsx src/shared/components/MediaGalleryItem.behavior.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the gallery handler single-selects an unselected right-click target first, derives ordered `generationIds` from `gallerySelectionMap` insertion order, clears gallery selection after successful shot creation, and opens `VideoGenerationModal` with the created `Shot` in the Generate Video path.

Confirmed the timeline menu hides Create Shot / Generate Video when any selected clip resolves to no `generationId`, sorts selected clips by `(trackIndex, action.start)` before creating the shot, and leaves the existing delete, split, mute, and stale-variant actions unchanged.
